scripts.build:css: cat src/renderer/styles/reset.css src/renderer/styles/variables.css src/renderer/styles/layout.css src/renderer/sidebar/sidebar.css src/renderer/panels/panels.css src/renderer/command-palette/command-palette.css > dist/renderer/styles.css
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/renderer && pnpm build:main && pnpm build:preload && pnpm build:renderer && pnpm build:css && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html
